name: github
description: GitHub - manage PRs, issues, notifications, and repos via the GitHub API.
voice_triggers: What are my open pull requests
Show me the issues on caal-tools
Create an issue for the bug we found

required_credentials.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
required_credentials.description: GitHub API predefined credential (uses your GitHub personal access token)

required_variables.name: GITHUB_DEFAULT_REPO
required_variables.description: Default GitHub repo in owner/repo format
